title: BLExAR Nano+OLED Starter
blurb: Real Arduino Nano ESP32 + SSD1306 OLED + BLE bridge + CSV export sketches from makersportal.com — the exact wiring used in BLExAR builds.
includes: CSV export sample + wiring diagram PDF

title: CoreML Offline Classifier Starter
blurb: SwiftUI + Vision + CoreML quantized FP16 model, 100% on-device, no cloud. Based on PopCloset + Notiary vector-index patterns.
includes: Xcode 15 SwiftUI project (runs on iPhone + iPad)
Vision + CoreML pipeline with quantization notes

title: Biquadia DSP Snippet Pack
blurb: Biquad filter + Metal shader snippet with clang++ verification notes — real kernels from Biquadia + AuraLinter agentic loop.

title: Support the studio
blurb: Pay what you want — support independent SF iOS craft, on-device first, no trackers. Get thank-you + early access to archive drops.
